name: Strapey
vision: A rugged premium knife brand inspired by outdoor survival tools and professional kitchen craftsmanship. Built for hunters, adventurers, chefs, and those who value durability, precision, and authentic craftsmanship.
description: Strapey delivers high-quality kitchen knives and hunting knives crafted for people who demand durability, outdoor reliability, and professional-grade performance. From wilderness survival to culinary excellence, our blades are forged with the precision and rugged authenticity demanded by serious users.

brandStory.headline: Crafted for Wild – Where Wilderness Meets Craftsmanship
brandStory.story:
Strapey was born from a passion for authentic tools that perform in the toughest conditions. Whether you're processing game in the wilderness or preparing a gourmet meal in your kitchen, our knives deliver the durability, precision, and reliability that serious users demand.

Inspired by the rugged beauty of the outdoors and the exacting standards of professional chefs, every Strapey blade represents a commitment to quality craftsmanship. We create tools built for real-world performance – knives that won't let you down when it matters most.

From hunters and outdoor enthusiasts to professional chefs and home cooks who value premium tools, Strapey serves those who refuse to compromise on quality. Our blades are more than tools – they're trusted companions for life's adventures, both wild and culinary.
themes: Knives built for the kitchen and the wild
brandStory.tone: Authentic and inspiring, connecting emotionally with hunters, adventurers, and serious cooks
